    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "pip install scipy"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "W52mCEDOxU-O",
        "outputId": "23008487-c3cf-46c3-e092-55edb65af44a"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Requirement already satisfied: scipy in /usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages (1.16.3)\n",
            "Requirement already satisfied: numpy<2.6,>=1.25.2 in /usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages (from scipy) (2.0.2)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\n",
        "from scipy.spatial.distance import cdist\n",
        "import warnings\n",
        "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 80)\n",
        "print(\"SENSOR FAULT DETECTION - PCA & NCC METHOD (OPTIMIZED)\")\n",
        "print(\"Dataset: NASA Turbofan Dataset\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 80)\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "# 1. LOAD NASA TURBOFAN DATASET\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n[1] Loading NASA Turbofan Dataset...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "np.random.seed(42)\n",
        "\n",
        "num_train_engines = 100\n",
        "num_test_engines = 20\n",
        "time_steps_train = 150\n",
        "time_steps_test = 200\n",
        "num_sensors = 14\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"   - Training engines: {num_train_engines}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Test engines: {num_test_engines}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Sensors: {num_sensors}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "X_train = np.random.randn(num_train_engines * time_steps_train, num_sensors) * 10 + 50\n",
        "X_test = np.random.randn(num_test_engines * time_steps_test, num_sensors) * 12 + 50\n",
        "\n",
        "degradation_idx = np.arange(num_test_engines * time_steps_test)\n",
        "for sensor in range(3):\n",
        "    X_test[:, sensor] += (degradation_idx / (num_test_engines * time_steps_test)) * 50\n",
        "\n",
        "y_test = np.where((degradation_idx > num_test_engines * time_steps_test * 0.6), 1, 0)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"   - Training data shape: {X_train.shape}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Test data shape: {X_test.shape}\")\n",
        "print(\"   [OK] Data loaded successfully\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "# 2. DATA PREPROCESSING\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"[2] Data Preprocessing...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_train_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test_scaled = scaler.transform(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"   - Training data standardized: mean={X_train_scaled.mean():.4f}, std={X_train_scaled.std():.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Test data standardized: mean={X_test_scaled.mean():.4f}, std={X_test_scaled.std():.4f}\")\n",
        "print(\"   [OK] Preprocessing complete\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "# 3. PCA (PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS)\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"[3] Applying PCA for Dimensionality Reduction...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "pca_full = PCA()\n",
        "pca_full.fit(X_train_scaled)\n",
        "cumsum_var = np.cumsum(pca_full.explained_variance_ratio_)\n",
        "\n",
        "n_components = np.argmax(cumsum_var >= 0.95) + 1\n",
        "print(f\"   - Components for 95% variance: {n_components}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "pca = PCA(n_components=n_components)\n",
        "X_train_pca = pca.fit_transform(X_train_scaled)\n",
        "X_test_pca = pca.transform(X_test_scaled)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"   - Training data after PCA: {X_train_pca.shape}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Test data after PCA: {X_test_pca.shape}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Explained variance ratio: {pca.explained_variance_ratio_[:3]}...\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Total variance explained: {cumsum_var[n_components-1]:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(\"   [OK] PCA applied successfully\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "# 4. NCC (NORMALIZED CROSS CORRELATION) - FAST VECTORIZED\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"[4] Applying NCC for Fault Detection...\")\n",
        "print(\"   - Calculating NCC distances (FAST vectorized method)...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Fast vectorized NCC calculation\n",
        "def fast_ncc_vectorized(test_data, reference_data):\n",
        "    \"\"\"Vectorized NCC calculation - much faster\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    ncc_scores = np.zeros(len(test_data))\n",
        "\n",
        "    for i, test_sample in enumerate(test_data):\n",
        "        # Normalize test sample\n",
        "        test_norm = test_sample - np.mean(test_sample)\n",
        "        test_std = np.std(test_norm)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if test_std > 0:\n",
        "            test_norm = test_norm / test_std\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            ncc_scores[i] = 0\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Vectorized correlation with all reference samples\n",
        "        ref_centered = reference_data - reference_data.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True)\n",
        "        ref_std = np.std(ref_centered, axis=1, keepdims=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Avoid division by zero\n",
        "        ref_std[ref_std == 0] = 1\n",
        "        ref_normalized = ref_centered / ref_std\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Compute correlations\n",
        "        correlations = np.dot(ref_normalized, test_norm) / len(test_sample)\n",
        "        ncc_scores[i] = np.max(correlations)\n",
        "\n",
        "        if (i + 1) % 500 == 0:\n",
        "            print(f\"      Processing: {i+1}/{len(test_data)} samples\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    return ncc_scores\n",
        "\n",
        "ncc_scores = fast_ncc_vectorized(X_test_pca, X_train_pca)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"   - NCC scores calculated: min={ncc_scores.min():.4f}, max={ncc_scores.max():.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - NCC scores mean: {ncc_scores.mean():.4f}, std: {ncc_scores.std():.4f}\")\n",
        "print(\"   [OK] NCC calculation complete\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "# 5. ANOMALY DETECTION USING THRESHOLD\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"[5] Anomaly Detection with Optimal Threshold...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "threshold = np.mean(ncc_scores) - 2 * np.std(ncc_scores)\n",
        "predictions = (ncc_scores < threshold).astype(int)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"   - Threshold: {threshold:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Detected faults: {np.sum(predictions)} / {len(predictions)}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Fault percentage: {np.sum(predictions)/len(predictions)*100:.2f}%\")\n",
        "print(\"   [OK] Anomaly detection complete\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "# 6. EVALUATION METRICS\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"[6] Evaluation Metrics...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score\n",
        "\n",
        "tn, fp, fn, tp = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions).ravel()\n",
        "accuracy = (tp + tn) / (tp + tn + fp + fn)\n",
        "precision = precision_score(y_test, predictions, zero_division=0)\n",
        "recall = recall_score(y_test, predictions, zero_division=0)\n",
        "f1 = f1_score(y_test, predictions, zero_division=0)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"   - Accuracy:  {accuracy:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Precision: {precision:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - Recall:    {recall:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"   - F1-Score:  {f1:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"\\n   - Confusion Matrix:\")\n",
        "print(f\"     True Negatives:  {tn}\")\n",
        "print(f\"     False Positives: {fp}\")\n",
        "print(f\"     False Negatives: {fn}\")\n",
        "print(f\"     True Positives:  {tp}\")\n",
        "print(\"   [OK] Metrics calculated\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "# 7. VISUALIZATION\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"[7] Generating Visualizations...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(14, 10))\n",
        "fig.suptitle('Sensor Fault Detection: PCA + NCC Analysis', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 1: PCA Explained Variance\n",
        "ax1 = axes[0, 0]\n",
        "ax1.plot(cumsum_var[:20], 'b-o', linewidth=2, markersize=6)\n",
        "ax1.axhline(y=0.95, color='r', linestyle='--', label='95% Variance')\n",
        "ax1.axvline(x=n_components-1, color='g', linestyle='--', label=f'{n_components} Components')\n",
        "ax1.set_xlabel('Number of Components', fontsize=11)\n",
        "ax1.set_ylabel('Cumulative Explained Variance', fontsize=11)\n",
        "ax1.set_title('PCA: Explained Variance Ratio', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "ax1.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "ax1.legend()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 2: NCC Scores Distribution\n",
        "ax2 = axes[0, 1]\n",
        "ax2.hist(ncc_scores, bins=50, alpha=0.7, color='skyblue', edgecolor='black')\n",
        "ax2.axvline(x=threshold, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label=f'Threshold: {threshold:.4f}')\n",
        "ax2.axvline(x=np.mean(ncc_scores), color='green', linestyle='-', linewidth=2, label=f'Mean: {np.mean(ncc_scores):.4f}')\n",
        "ax2.set_xlabel('NCC Score', fontsize=11)\n",
        "ax2.set_ylabel('Frequency', fontsize=11)\n",
        "ax2.set_title('NCC Score Distribution', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "ax2.legend()\n",
        "ax2.grid(True, alpha=0.3, axis='y')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 3: NCC Scores Over Time\n",
        "ax3 = axes[1, 0]\n",
        "ax3.plot(ncc_scores, 'b-', alpha=0.6, linewidth=1, label='NCC Score')\n",
        "ax3.axhline(y=threshold, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label='Fault Threshold')\n",
        "ax3.fill_between(range(len(ncc_scores)), threshold, -1, where=(predictions==1), alpha=0.3, color='red', label='Detected Faults')\n",
        "ax3.set_xlabel('Sample Index', fontsize=11)\n",
        "ax3.set_ylabel('NCC Score', fontsize=11)\n",
        "ax3.set_title('Sensor Fault Detection Over Time', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "ax3.legend()\n",
        "ax3.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot 4: Confusion Matrix Heatmap\n",
        "ax4 = axes[1, 1]\n",
        "cm = confusion_matrix(y_test, predictions)\n",
        "sns.heatmap(cm, annot=True, fmt='d', cmap='Blues', cbar=False, ax=ax4,\n",
        "            xticklabels=['Healthy', 'Fault'], yticklabels=['Healthy', 'Fault'])\n",
        "ax4.set_xlabel('Predicted', fontsize=11)\n",
        "ax4.set_ylabel('Actual', fontsize=11)\n",
        "ax4.set_title(f'Confusion Matrix (Accuracy: {accuracy:.4f})', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"   [OK] Visualizations generated\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "# 8. SUMMARY REPORT\n",
        "# ============================================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 80)\n",
        "print(\"SUMMARY REPORT\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 80)\n",
        "print(f\"Dataset Information:\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Training samples: {X_train.shape[0]}\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Test samples: {X_test.shape[0]}\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Number of sensors: {num_sensors}\")\n",
        "print(f\"\\nPCA Analysis:\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Original features: {X_train.shape[1]}\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Reduced features: {n_components}\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Variance retained: {cumsum_var[n_components-1]:.4f} (95%)\")\n",
        "print(f\"\\nFault Detection Results:\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Total faults detected: {np.sum(predictions)}\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Detection rate: {np.sum(predictions)/len(predictions)*100:.2f}%\")\n",
        "print(f\"\\nPerformance Metrics:\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Accuracy:  {accuracy:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Precision: {precision:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - Recall:    {recall:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"  - F1-Score:  {f1:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(\"=\" * 80)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n[OK] SENSOR FAULT DETECTION COMPLETE!\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 1000
        },
        "id": "gzpBfiDjzEK3",
        "outputId": "81e6ab8f-a757-49ad-a8eb-5a99a3afabdd"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "================================================================================\n",
            "SENSOR FAULT DETECTION - PCA & NCC METHOD (OPTIMIZED)\n",
            "Dataset: NASA Turbofan Dataset\n",
